-        .html(function (d: { data: { name: string; value: string }; x1: number; x0: number }) {
+// Scoped under `body` so these overrides win over the vendor `.d3-flame-graph-tip`
+// rules, which d3-flame-graph 5 ships inside its ESM entry and Angular injects
+// (with the lazily-loaded flame graph chunk) after this global stylesheet.
